creator: dpolyg@gmail.com
text:
Hi Chris,

Thank you.
I am not sure I qualified enough to be a port maintainer...
I will keep an eye on these 3 ports certainly for a while because I need them and can reply to bug reports, but doing something like pushing commits to the port tree... is scary =)
I've never done this before.
Can you maybe assign me as a secondary maintainer if such role exist?

Regards,
Denis.
